np.gov.bipad.hydrology.Kafka.description: Kafka producer endpoint for Nepal BIPAD River Monitoring CloudEvents on the `nepal-bipad-hydrology` topic keyed by `{station_id}`.

np.gov.bipad.hydrology.Mqtt.description: MQTT 5 producer endpoint for nepal-bipad-hydrology CloudEvents using the documented UNS topic hierarchy.

np.gov.bipad.hydrology.Amqp.description: AMQP 1.0 producer endpoint for nepal-bipad-hydrology CloudEvents on the configured broker address.

np.gov.bipad.hydrology.RiverStation.name: RiverStation
np.gov.bipad.hydrology.RiverStation.description: A reference record for one river monitoring stations in Nepal published by Nepal's BIPAD Portal. It fires when the bridge publishes or refreshes the station catalog so consumers can interpret measurement events.

np.gov.bipad.hydrology.WaterLevelReading.name: WaterLevelReading
np.gov.bipad.hydrology.WaterLevelReading.description: A current measurement from Nepal's BIPAD Portal for one monitoring site. It carries river water level observations when the upstream feed reports a new or refreshed value.

np.gov.bipad.hydrology.description: Events from Nepal BIPAD River Monitoring covering river monitoring stations in Nepal and their current measurements. Use the reference records to identify stations and the measurement records for the latest observations.

np.gov.bipad.hydrology.mqtt.description: MQTT 5 variant of nepal-bipad-hydrology events with UNS topics for wildcard subscribers.

np.gov.bipad.hydrology.amqp.description: AMQP 1.0 variant of nepal-bipad-hydrology events for queue-oriented consumers and Azure Service Bus.

subject.description: AMQP message subject matching the CloudEvent subject and Kafka key identity.

basin.description: Routing property for AMQP subscription filters (basin).

x-opt-partition-key.description: Service Bus/Event Hubs partition key matching the stable CloudEvent subject.

subject.description: AMQP message subject matching the CloudEvent subject and Kafka key identity.

basin.description: Routing property for AMQP subscription filters (basin).

x-opt-partition-key.description: Service Bus/Event Hubs partition key matching the stable CloudEvent subject.

schema.name: RiverStation

RiverStation.name: RiverStation
RiverStation.description: Reference data for a BIPAD river monitoring station in Nepal, including location, river basin, administrative boundaries, and configured danger/warning thresholds.

station_id.description: Unique integer identifier of the river station assigned by the BIPAD portal, transmitted as a string for key compatibility.

title.description: Human-readable name of the river station, typically in the format 'River at Location' (e.g. 'Babai at Chepang').

basin.description: Name of the river basin the station belongs to (e.g. 'Bagmati', 'Narayani', 'Koshi', 'Karnali', 'Mahakali', 'Babai').

latitude.description: Latitude coordinate of the station in WGS84 decimal degrees, extracted from the GeoJSON point geometry.

longitude.description: Longitude coordinate of the station in WGS84 decimal degrees, extracted from the GeoJSON point geometry.

elevation.description: Elevation of the station in meters above sea level, as reported by the BIPAD portal. Null when not available.

danger_level.description: Configured danger water level threshold in meters for the station. Water levels above this indicate a danger condition. Null when not configured.

warning_level.description: Configured warning water level threshold in meters for the station. Water levels above this indicate a warning condition. Null when not configured.

description.description: Free-text description of the station, may include historical notes, relocation history, or elevation corrections. Null when not provided.

data_source.description: Origin system providing the station data, typically 'hydrology.gov.np' for Nepal Department of Hydrology and Meteorology stations.

province.description: Nepal province administrative code for the station location. Null when not assigned.

district.description: Nepal district administrative code for the station location. Null when not assigned.

municipality.description: Nepal municipality or rural municipality administrative code for the station location. Null when not assigned.

ward.description: Nepal ward-level administrative code for the station location. Null when not assigned.

schema.description: Reference details for one monitoring station or site in the Nepal BIPAD River Monitoring source.

schema.name: WaterLevelReading

WaterLevelReading.name: WaterLevelReading
WaterLevelReading.description: Real-time water level telemetry reading from a BIPAD river monitoring station in Nepal, including current water level, alert status, and trend direction.

station_id.description: Unique integer identifier of the river station assigned by the BIPAD portal, transmitted as a string for key compatibility.

title.description: Human-readable name of the river station at the time of the reading.

basin.description: Name of the river basin the station belongs to at the time of the reading.

water_level.description: Current water level at the station in meters. Null when the station has no current reading available.

danger_level.description: Configured danger water level threshold in meters. Null when not configured.

warning_level.description: Configured warning water level threshold in meters. Null when not configured.

status.description: Current alert status of the station relative to configured thresholds. Known values: 'BELOW WARNING LEVEL', 'WARNING', 'DANGER'.

trend.description: Direction of water level change. Known values: 'STEADY', 'RISING', 'FALLING'.

water_level_on.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the water level was measured, in Nepal Standard Time (+05:45).

schema.description: Measurement payload for observations in the Nepal BIPAD River Monitoring source.

schema.description: Reference details for one monitoring station or site in the Nepal BIPAD River Monitoring source.

schema.name: WaterLevelReading
schema.doc: Real-time water level telemetry reading from a BIPAD river monitoring station in Nepal.

fields.name: station_id
fields.doc: Unique integer identifier of the river station.

fields.name: title
fields.doc: Human-readable name of the river station at the time of the reading.

fields.name: basin
fields.doc: Name of the river basin the station belongs to.

fields.name: water_level
fields.doc: Current water level at the station in meters. Null when no reading available.

fields.name: danger_level
fields.doc: Configured danger water level threshold in meters. Null when not configured.

fields.name: warning_level
fields.doc: Configured warning water level threshold in meters. Null when not configured.

fields.name: status
fields.doc: Current alert status: 'BELOW WARNING LEVEL', 'WARNING', or 'DANGER'.

fields.name: trend
fields.doc: Direction of water level change: 'STEADY', 'RISING', or 'FALLING'.

fields.name: water_level_on
fields.doc: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the water level was measured.

schema.description: Measurement payload for observations in the Nepal BIPAD River Monitoring source.

description: Nepal BIPAD River Monitoring publishes river water level observations from Nepal's BIPAD Portal for river monitoring stations in Nepal. These events let consumers build real-time monitoring, alerting, and operational dashboards without polling the upstream API directly.

documentation.description: Source documentation for Nepal BIPAD River Monitoring, including upstream API context and bridge deployment notes.
